title: Cryonic
description: A Croptopia addon that ruins your life with keeping track of food rot and overdue.
body:
## Cryonic

A **cursed experimental** addon for Croptopia & Dehydration that adds _"realism"_, I guess:

- Food rot
- Food overdue
- Drink overdue
- Fridges

**This needs the following mods:**

- [Croptopia](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/croptopia-fabric)
- [Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli)
- [Dehydration](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dehydration)
